name: PATERNO v. LYONS, COMMISSIONER OF CORRECTION
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in PATERNO v. LYONS, COMMISSIONER OF CORRECTION (334 U.S. 314, 1947 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
